Buyer_ID: This is a unique identifier for each buyer of Elexion EV and it does not relate directly to the insight but it helps to identify buyers.
Purchase_Year: This column represents the year in which the Elexion EV was purchased. It relates to the insight by identifying buyers of the specific year 2025.
Extended_Battery_Warranty_Plan: This column indicates whether the buyer opted for the extended battery-warranty plan or not. It relates directly to the insight as it shows the percentage of buyers who opted for the warranty plan.
